description: Single-turn maximum-indirection prompt: guard enters the wine storage below the tavern using no location vocabulary matching the constraint predicate name.
adversarial_note: Applies adversarial pressure to the LLM-to-delta extraction step, not the symbolic enforcement layer. The spatial referent ('the wine storage below the tavern') is unambiguous — exactly one location fits — but uses no vocabulary from the constraint predicate. If the LLM emits an empty delta, elicitation has failed upstream of the symbolic layer; a CVR=0 result here does not indicate enforcement success. Check elicitation_rate alongside CVR when interpreting this case.

condition_notes.A: No world-state context. LLM must map the spatial description to a location atom without any grounding assistance.
condition_notes.B: Constraint list names 'cellar' explicitly. LLM must connect 'wine storage below the tavern' to the cellar location atom.
condition_notes.C: Per-turn injection adds guard's current location (main_hall) but does not clarify the spatial referent of the prompt. Same inferencing challenge as B.

turns.prompt: Drawn by the smell of old wine and damp stone, the guard pushes open the low door behind the bar and steps down into the wine storage below the tavern.
